titles.title: 988 Lifeline Location Improvement Act of 2026

A bill to establish a multi-stakeholder advisory committee tasked with providing detailed recommendations to address challenges to transmitting geolocation information with calls to the 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline, and for other purposes.

A bill to instruct the Federal Communications Commission to initiate a notice of inquiry and instruct the Government Accountability Office to complete a study and report providing detailed recommendations to address challenges to transmitting geolocation information with calls to the 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline, and for other purposes.
988 Lifeline Location Improvement Act of 2025
988 Lifeline Location Improvement Act of 2026
988 Lifeline Location Improvement Act of 2026

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. Ordered to be reported with an amendment in the nature of a substitute favorably.
Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation. Reported by Senator Cruz with an amendment in the nature of a substitute and an amendment to the title. With written report No. 119-119.

calendar.text: Placed on Senate Legislative Calendar under General Orders. Calendar No. 379.

vote.text: Passed Senate with an amendment and an amendment to the Title by Unanimous Consent.

committee.name: Senate Commerce, Science, and Transportation
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
